issues.details: The bundle page 'clinical-services-news' at .eds-migration/state/source-bundle/pages/clinical-services-news/ exists but contains ONLY meta.json — no desktop.png, no mobile.png, no index.html. The README acknowledges this as a 'partial capture — timed out on first attempt' but does not record an alternate fallback URL or a re-attempted successful capture. Per check #8, 'Missing screenshots = FAIL'.
issues.remediation: Re-run the crawler for https://www.almacgroup.com/clinical-services/news/ with a longer timeout or a fallback URL from the same archetype. The clinical-services-news archetype needs at least one fully captured page with both desktop and mobile screenshots.

issues.criterion: Spot-check for pre-hydration capture / valid reference screenshots (checks #10 + #6)
issues.details: The bundle page 'knowledge-library' at .eds-migration/state/source-bundle/pages/knowledge-library/ was captured from https://www.almacgroup.com/knowledge/library/ which returns HTTP 404 ('Page not found - Almac') both at crawl time (meta.json title = 'Page not found - Almac', text_length=9619) and confirmed at verification time (curl returns HTTP/2 404). This archetype has 721 pages in the manifest. The reference screenshots in this bundle slot show an error page, not library content — any downstream visual fidelity gate comparing migrated knowledge-library pages against this reference will be meaningless.
issues.remediation: Replace the knowledge-library bundle capture with a valid knowledge/library item URL (e.g. https://www.almacgroup.com/knowledge/library/2019-investments-centered-around-cell-and-gene-therapies/ which is a real article). Re-capture desktop.png, mobile.png, and index.html for that slug.

issues.criterion: Each archetype has a sampleUrl with a corresponding screenshot in source-bundle/pages/ (Orchestrator check #2)
issues.details: 7 archetypes in the manifest have NO corresponding page directory with screenshots in source-bundle/pages/: 'award' (50 pages), 'api-chemical-product' (70 pages), 'careers-story' (39 pages), 'careers-resource' (36 pages), 'expert-profile' (12 pages), 'blog-category' (1 page), 'client-portal' (1 page). Total affected pages: ~209.
issues.remediation: For each missing archetype, add a captured page to the bundle: pick the first valid (non-redirect, non-404) sampleUrl, run Playwright with the documented settle strategy, and commit the desktop.png/mobile.png/index.html/meta.json under a slug directory.

issues.criterion: Bundle README matches manifest (check #11) — bundle page slugs appear in manifest
issues.details: 4 bundle page slugs do not appear in the manifest's .pages[] array: 'careers-careers', 'careers-news-almac-recognised-at-the-nus-2023-awards', 'knowledge-library', 'knowledge-library-a-phase-ii-study-evaluating-the-safety-and-efficacy-of-two-amg'. These pages were captured and included in the bundle but were not indexed in manifest.json. Downstream agents relying on manifest.pages[] to discover the bundle reference for these archetypes will not find them.
issues.remediation: Add entries to manifest.pages[] for these URLs (or update captured_screenshot flag on existing entries) so bundle-manifest consistency is maintained.

issues.criterion: Manifest http_status coverage (Orchestrator check #6 — redirects captured)
issues.details: 3584 of 3605 manifest pages have http_status=null; only 21 pages have http_status populated. During spot-check, https://www.almacgroup.com/careers/resources/a-day-in-the-life-of-a-commercial-manager/ returned HTTP 302 redirecting to /careers/almac-work-experience-hub/login (auth wall) — this page is incorrectly categorized as archetype 'careers-resource' rather than marked as a gated redirect. Redirects and auth-walled pages were not systematically identified.
issues.remediation: Run a lightweight status-check pass over all manifest URLs and populate http_status. Mark auth-redirected pages with appropriate status/flags so migration agents know which pages to skip or handle specially.

evidence.render_strategy: N/A — bundle capture timed out; only meta.json present, no index.html or screenshots
evidence.finding: FAIL: Bundle page directory exists but contains no desktop.png, mobile.png, or index.html. Only meta.json is present. Rule #8 states missing screenshots = FAIL.

evidence.finding: LOW CONCERN: Returns HTTP 302 to /careers/almac-work-experience-hub/login (auth wall). This careers-resource page is gated. http_status not populated in manifest.

evidence.finding: PASS: Chrome captures exist, are non-empty, and contain meaningful nav content (705 header links, 16 footer links).
PASS: manifest has 3605 pages (>10 minimum). Combined sitemap URLs ~4007. Delta ~10% (<20% threshold). Likely explained by deduplication across overlapping main/sub sitemaps.

summary: FAIL — 2 high-severity issues: (1) clinical-services-news bundle page missing all screenshots/HTML (timeout during capture); (2) knowledge-library archetype reference (721 pages) captures a live 404 error page, making it useless as a fidelity baseline. Additionally: 7 archetypes lack bundle screenshots, 4 bundle pages are absent from manifest.pages[], and some careers-resource pages are auth-gated. Manifest itself is comprehensive (3605 URLs, 27 archetypes, documented render strategy, mostly complete bundle with correct hydration).
